name: Ubiquiti LTU Pro
title: Ubiquiti LTU Pro
short_description: 5 GHz LTU™ PtMP Client radio with advanced RF performance, 24dBi antenna, max. throughput up to 600+ Mbps, 10/20/30/40/50 MHz channel width flexibility
description: 5 GHz LTU™ PtMP Client radio with advanced RF performance, 24dBi antenna, max. throughput up to 600+ Mbps, 10/20/30/40/50 MHz channel width flexibility

detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti LTU Pro is a high-performance wireless broadband device that is part of Ubiquiti Networks' innovative LTU product line. This device leverages the proprietary LTU technology developed by Ubiquiti to provide superior wireless communication capabilities, especially in point-to-multi-point (PtMP) scenarios. Designed to deliver 900+ Mbps throughput on 25+ km range wireless broadband connectivity, the LTU Pro is tailored for internet service providers (ISPs) and network administrators who demand reliability, scalability, and efficiency in their network infrastructure.
Compatible with LTU devices only. LTU Pro functions in a PtMP environment with the LTU-Rocket as the BaseStation.

For the LTU Pro to operate and provide wireless broadband connectivity, it typically requires a counterpart with which to communicate. In the context of a PtMP setup, the LTU Pro serves as a base station or access point, connecting to multiple client devices (CPEs - Customer Premises Equipment) to distribute internet access over a wide area. This setup is common for internet service providers (ISPs) looking to cover rural areas, large campuses, or any scenario requiring broadband distribution to multiple points from a central location. In a point-to-point (PtP) configuration, the LTU Pro would pair with another LTU Pro or compatible LTU device to establish a direct wireless link between two points. This application is often used for creating high-capacity backhaul connections between network segments or connecting two remote locations within the same network infrastructure.

Operating within the 5 GHz frequency band, the LTU Pro minimizes interference from congested spectrums, ensuring a cleaner and more reliable signal for users. This choice of frequency also allows for more efficient use of the spectrum, providing the bandwidth necessary to support high-speed data services and broadband connectivity across extensive areas.

Equipped with an integrated high-gain directional antenna, the LTU Pro is designed to maximize signal strength and coverage, making it an ideal solution for connecting remote locations or providing broadband access in rural or underserved areas. The device's ability to maintain stable and high-performance wireless links over 25+ km distance is crucial for applications that require reliable, uninterrupted connectivity.

Security is a critical concern for wireless networks, and the LTU Pro addresses this with advanced encryption and security protocols to protect the network and data transmissions from unauthorized access. These security features are vital for maintaining the integrity and confidentiality of the network, especially in scenarios where sensitive information is being transmitted.

From a management perspective, the LTU Pro integrates seamlessly with Ubiquiti's Network Management System (UNMS), offering a comprehensive suite of tools for device configuration, network monitoring, and performance optimization. This platform provides an intuitive interface for administrators to manage their networks efficiently, enabling real-time adjustments to device settings, frequency allocations, and power levels to ensure optimal network performance and user experience.

In urban environments, the LTU Pro finds its place in creating point-to-multi-point (PtMP) networks that serve as the backbone for municipal wireless networks. These networks can provide city-wide Wi-Fi access, support smart city applications, and enhance public safety communications. The device's high-capacity throughput and ability to operate in congested spectrums without significant interference enable municipalities to offer robust and dependable services to residents and visitors alike. Moreover, For enterprise campuses or large institutions like universities, the LTU Pro can be used to link different buildings or facilities across considerable distances. This application ensures a seamless and high-speed network connection throughout the campus, facilitating efficient communication and data exchange. Whether it's connecting research facilities, administrative buildings, or student accommodations, the LTU Pro delivers the necessary bandwidth and reliability to support the diverse needs of these complex environments.

Event organizers and broadcasters also benefit from the LTU Pro's capabilities, especially for outdoor events requiring temporary, high-speed internet access or live streaming services. The device's ease of deployment and ability to provide long-range connectivity make it a practical solution for covering large areas, ensuring that media, vendors, and attendees remain connected with reliable internet service.

In summary, the Ubiquiti LTU Pro is a cutting-edge wireless broadband device that combines Ubiquiti's proprietary LTU technology with advanced features such as high-order modulation, an integrated high-gain antenna, and comprehensive network management capabilities. Its design and performance make it an exceptional choice for ISPs, network administrators, and enterprises looking to deploy high-capacity, long-range wireless networks. Whether for connecting remote areas, providing broadband access in challenging environments, or creating robust backhaul links, the LTU Pro offers a reliable, scalable, and efficient wireless solution.
